metadata.description: Lou Lohman's Claude Code skills — a verification-first all-in-one SEO auditor and a guided cross-codebase parity workflow.

plugins.name: ltl-seo
plugins.description: All-in-one, verification-first SEO: technical, on-page, structured data, internal linking & site architecture, keyword & content strategy, competitor analysis, AEO/AI-visibility, and programmatic-SEO-at-scale. Inspects the real source/HTML before claiming anything is missing, web-verifies time-sensitive guidance, and pushes back on deprecated tactics.

plugins.name: ltl-parity
plugins.description: Guided cross-codebase parity for keeping two (or more) related projects in sync — e.g. a website and its companion app. Classifies every change, warns on safety/security/ambiguous risk, and verifies both sides instead of blindly copying.
